title: Update app color scheme and themes

requirements.text: Redesign the app's color palette with a fresh, cohesive visual theme. Update the CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css for all themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean). Choose a distinctive primary accent color away from blue/purple — such as emerald green or teal — and apply it consistently across buttons, badges, active states, charts, and highlights. Ensure adequate contrast in both light and dark modes.
acceptanceCriteria: All six themes in ThemeContext (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean) use the updated color tokens
Primary accent color is consistently applied to buttons, active nav links, badges, and status indicators
Both light and dark modes have sufficient contrast ratios for text readability
Tailwind config color tokens in tailwind.config.js are updated to match the new palette
No blue or purple tones appear as the primary accent unless they are part of a theme variant

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change any backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Adding new themes beyond the existing six
Changing layout, typography sizes, or component structure
